title: Economic benefit realisation and evaluation of the Met Office Hadley Centre Climate Programme
body: "The Met Office Hadley Centre Climate Programme (HCCP) is a UK government-funded climate research programme that is dedicated to advancing the understanding of climate science and its impacts, and plays a vital role in providing robust, relevant, and current scientific evidence to the UK government and the research community.    DESNZ commissioned London Economics to undertake a comprehensive analysis of the effectiveness of the 2018 to 2021 Hadley Centre Climate Programme and to estimate the value of the benefits created by the programme. This summary report describes the key findings of this study.  "
